rules: Integer zero is reserved for padding; field, operator, and condition IDs are explicit and stable.
Canonical sample values are finite absolute values with no builder rounding or normalization.
Input availability is gated by available_hour <= prediction_hour while block membership follows clinical_hour.
H1, M4, and F24 share the same canonical fields; only legal operators, conditions, and block geometry differ.
CXR is input-only and never appears in target_events.

scope.urine_output_policy: sum_and_count_only; no rate or oliguria target until collection intervals are reliable
scope.censoring_policy: samples require a fully observed prediction+24h ICU window
